hypothesis: Systems-optimizer recovery becomes safer if every hypothesis-card artifact in `CLAW/control-plane/system-optimizer/hypotheses/` must resolve to exactly one backlog card with the same id and status, so orphaned or filename-drifted replay artifacts cannot survive outside backlog truth.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` still reported clean after a controlled orphan baseline card `CLAW/control-plane/system-optimizer/hypotheses/sysopt.orphan-inventory-baseline.json` was added with no matching backlog item, so replayable artifact inventory could drift outside backlog truth. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects orphan or filename/id-drifted hypothesis cards in `CLAW/control-plane/system-optimizer/hypotheses/` while the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if every systems-optimizer hypothesis-card artifact must resolve to exactly one backlog item with the same id and status and the fixed scope-local evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Systems-optimizer hypothesis-card inventory must stay backlog-linked; orphan or filename/id-drifted card files weaken replayable recovery and reporting by leaving stale artifacts outside backlog truth.
